# Security & Reporting Policy

## Copyright & Authorship

This repository, including all source code, SVG graphics, README,
configuration files, and design, is the sole intellectual property of:

**Vitalii Marchenko** — <marchenko.vitaliy1@gmail.com>

All Rights Reserved. See [LICENSE](../LICENSE) for the full
proprietary view-only terms.

## Reporting Copyright Violations

If you discover this repository (or any portion of its content) being
**copied, forked, mirrored, modified, or redistributed without
permission** on GitHub or any other platform, please report it:

- **Primary contact:** <marchenko.vitaliy1@gmail.com>
- **Telegram:** [@m_a_r_c_h_e_n_k_o](https://t.me/m_a_r_c_h_e_n_k_o)

Please include:

1. URL of the infringing content
2. Platform (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, personal site, etc.)
3. Description of what was copied
4. Any supporting evidence (screenshots, timestamps)

The author will promptly issue a DMCA takedown notice and pursue
appropriate legal action.

## Reporting Security Issues

If you find a security issue in any code or workflow file in this
repository, please **do not** open a public issue. Instead, contact
the author privately via email at <marchenko.vitaliy1@gmail.com>.

A response should be expected within **48 hours**.

## Supported Versions

This is a personal profile repository — only the `main` branch is
maintained. Historical commits are not back-ported or patched.
